spec_match.rationale: Perfect illustration of serial async sequences. Highlights standard await loop pattern awaiting each pane offset settle.

interactive.rationale: Excellent controls: supports running, resetting, stopping (via AbortController signals), and real-time visual stepper indicator updates.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned precisely with parent concepts indexing.

edge_cases.rationale: Exemplary integration. Employs AbortController to allow clean escapes from delays or active scroll awaits.

references.rationale: Properly points to the canonical ChromeStatus page under see also links.

design_system.rationale: Uses clear horizontal step bars, borders, custom highlights, and detailed logs.
